testcase.name: test_checkout_status

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 'pending' but got 'failed' — backend likely maps Stripe payment_status=unpaid to 'failed' incorrectly. Full body: {'txn_id': 'txn_57c0e65fb80b', 'stripe_session_id': 'cs_test_a13Lhxyh1cT30QWo8S5psSCd9W5iPrxWtAPTpfsh9BV6xOKdcM0iHhFaYh', 'student_id': 'usr_be166c6c3cd0', 'plan_id': 'pln_9f74417f70e6', 'plan_name': 'Monthly Membership', 'amount': 2500.0, 'currency': 'INR', 'status': 'failed', 'created_at': '2026-06-14T11:40:36.514000'} assert 'failed' == 'pending'
- pending + failed

testcase.failure: test_trainertrack_api.py:191: in test_checkout_status assert body["status"] == "pending", f"Expected 'pending' but got '{body['status']}' — backend likely maps Stripe payment_status=unpaid to 'failed' incorrectly. Full body: {body}" E AssertionError: Expected 'pending' but got 'failed' — backend likely maps Stripe payment_status=unpaid to 'failed' incorrectly. Full body: {'txn_id': 'txn_57c0e65fb80b', 'stripe_session_id': 'cs_test_a13Lhxyh1cT30QWo8S5psSCd9W5iPrxWtAPTpfsh9BV6xOKdcM0iHhFaYh', 'student_id': 'usr_be166c6c3cd0', 'plan_id': 'pln_9f74417f70e6', 'plan_name': 'Monthly Membership', 'amount': 2500.0, 'currency': 'INR', 'status': 'failed', 'created_at': '2026-06-14T11:40:36.514000'} E assert 'failed' == 'pending' E E - pending E + failed
